title: ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW WALNUT STREET ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient and intensive outpatient services for adults dealing with alcohol and drug problems. Also provides a DUII Adult Addictions outpatient program for adults required to receive treatment as part of a DUII sentence. Plus, specialty substance use disorder for Latino adults. Gender specific intensive outpatient substance use disorder program available. 971 SW Walnut Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (503) 645-9010 - Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 645-9010 For follow-up calls Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: We accept OHP, Medicaid or Medicare. If you need coverage, we can help you get enrolled. Some services are available on a sliding fee scale. We do not turn people away for lack of ability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 57 to the corner of SW Oak and SW Armco Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW WALNUT STREET
